title: PCFR condemns Chinese monkey video
description: THE Philippine Council for Foreign Relations (PCFR) condemned the artificial intelligence (AI) video posted by China Daily last week that depicted a Filipino as a monkey.
content:

title: China considers tighter export controls on AI models and chips
description: CHINESE authorities are considering tightening export controls on artificial intelligence (AI) and semiconductor technologies, the Financial Times (FT) reported on Tuesday.

title: Judge approves a $1.5B Anthropic settlement over pirated books
description: A federal judge has approved a $1.5 billion copyright settlement in which artificial intelligence company Anthropic will pay thousands of authors about $3,000 per book after using pirated copies of their works to train its Claude chatbot.
content:

title: Why government-owned artificial intelligence is a terrible idea
description: In the push to regulate artificial intelligence (AI), a dangerous idea is gaining ground in Washington: handing the government ownership stakes in the biggest AI companies.
content:

title: AI stocks gather strength as oil prices top US$92
description: More gains for makers of computer chips and other winners of the artificial-intelligence boom are carrying Wall Street higher on Tuesday.
content:

title: New Study Explains Why Some AI Regulations May Do More Harm Than Good
description: Global governments are grappling with how to regulate artificial intelligence effectively. A study by researchers from Cornell and Carnegie Mellon warns that improperly crafted regulations could compromise AI safety. , AI, Times Now
